ModMetaData.name: Ship HoloAI
ModMetaData.author: chibi
ModMetaData.description:
Your gravship comes alive. Adds the HoloCore, a gravship facility housing a shipboard AI personified as a holographic avatar who roams your ship, chats with the crew, and keeps watch over your voyage.
Default persona: P.R.I.S.M. (Photonic Response Intelligence System Matrix).
Features: - HoloCore gravship facility, linked to your grav engine - A roaming, intangible holographic avatar bound to your ship - Crew interactions and mood boosts - Personality-flavored alerts and announcements - Ambient holographic charm
Requires the Odyssey expansion and Harmony.
